items.q: The character Francis Ford Coppola appears in The Passion of Joan of Arc.
items.explanation: Francis Ford Coppola appears in Apocalypse Now, not The Passion of Joan of Arc.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Fritz Lang.
items.explanation: Fritz Lang is strongly linked to M.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Federico Fellini.
items.explanation: Federico Fellini is strongly linked to 8 1/2.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Oldboy?
items.explanation: Park Chan-wook is one of the defining characters in Oldboy.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Bong Joon-ho.
items.explanation: Bong Joon-ho is strongly linked to Memories of Murder.

items.q: Which movie features the character Paul Thomas Anderson?
items.explanation: Paul Thomas Anderson is associated with Phantom Thread.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Carl Theodor Dreyer.
items.a: The Passion of Joan of Arc
items.explanation: Carl Theodor Dreyer is strongly linked to The Passion of Joan of Arc.

items.q: The character Guillermo del Toro appears in Pans Labyrinth.
items.explanation: Guillermo del Toro is a key character in Pans Labyrinth.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Fargo?
items.explanation: Coen Brothers is one of the defining characters in Fargo.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie There Will Be Blood?
items.explanation: Paul Thomas Anderson is one of the defining characters in There Will Be Blood.
